criteria.criterionText: Then the QA bundle should include an HTML preview index when HTML rendering is available
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The QA bundle and its contents were not provided, preventing verification of the HTML preview index's inclusion.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the complete QA bundle for direct inspection.

criteria.criterionText: And the preview index should include:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The HTML preview index was not provided, making it impossible to verify if it contains the specified fields.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the HTML preview index for direct inspection.

criteria.criterionText: And ASCII sketches should be checked for readable HTML rendering
criteria.llmObservationSummary: No rendered HTML output or visual evidence of ASCII sketches was provided, preventing a check for readable rendering.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the rendered HTML output or screenshots showing ASCII sketches for review.

criteria.criterionText: And visual render blockers should prevent QA pass.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Without access to the rendered HTML or a mechanism to observe visual render blockers and their impact on QA pass/fail status, this criterion cannot be verified.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide rendered HTML and the final QA pass/fail status, along with any identified render blockers, for review.
